text:
- Unbreak, fix checksum mismatch reported by pointhat (via pav@)

Note, the Windows GUI Tools bundle is at 5.0r12 which inclues
version 1.2 of mysql-query-browser, we should look at upgrading all 3 somehow...

    * MySQL Administrator 1.2 Generally Available (GA)
    * MySQL Query Browser 1.2 Generally Available (GA)
    * MySQL Migration Toolkit 1.1 Generally Available (GA)
